name: Orb Weaver

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It shifts its body and snaps with a quick side bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or move out of the front flank as the motion starts.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It chains several quick bites together without giving a free gap.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish between hits unless you have already broken its rhythm.
attacks.notes: Its main sequence once it stays on top of the player.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It roars and lunges farther than its normal bite pattern.
attacks.howToAvoid: Late-dodge to the side or perfect-block to keep your guard intact.
attacks.notes: Breaks guard if it is not perfect-blocked.

attacks.name: Web Shot
attacks.tell: It rears up and fires a web at a distant target.
attacks.howToAvoid: Strafe before the shot lines up; if it hits, break the web with your equipped weapon.
attacks.notes: Heavily reduces movement and can leave webs on the ground even when it misses.

description: A full-sized hunting spider, more dangerous than its young because of its area control and immobilizing webs. It is a recurring threat across much of the yard.
behavior: It semi-randomly patrols small areas, spins fresh webs, and often sleeps near its nests or nearby young spiders. It wakes if nearby webs break or another spider in its group is harmed.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player and uses webs to immobilize targets at range. If you get caught, you can still break out with an equipped weapon, but the follow-up punishment comes quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive toward most spiders and neutral to other creatures until attacked. Smaller creatures caught in its webs can trigger it into aggressive behavior.
strategy: Spicy remains the key weakness. If it webs you, break out immediately, and do not waste light attacks into its blocking stance; save a charged strike to crack the defense.
respawnInfo: Default: 2 days. Upper Yard: 1.75 days. Undershed: 3 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 50
3-Combo Bite: 30
Charged Bite: 65
Web Attack: 40

specialTraits: Its web shot immobilizes or heavily slows, and its normal attacks keep pressure on while the player tries to break free.
